name: Starfield: Roleplay RPG
description:
Dense and detailed RPG from Bethesda's 'Starfield' game.

Read first: For my taste, I feel like it's well-structured and detailed, but I used too many tokens for my liking, since I tried to add a little bit of everything within the Starfield universe so that older AI models have something to guide them. If you use Deepseek R1, you can move the character cards I put in the scenario as the main description and just put this prompt in the scenario to save on tokens: [The setting, world building, characters, and situations must be written in Bethesda 'Starfield' game universe, being faithful to its lore and characters.]
creator: Venise3
